findings.title: Web UI implemented but absent from primary onboarding
findings.description: testforge web exists but README Quick Start is CLI-only. GUI-first users never see install/serve/browser steps.
findings.recommendation: Add Web UI subsection to README Quick Start.

findings.title: Package version and internal plan versions disagree
findings.description: pyproject.toml is 0.1.0 Alpha; docs describe v0.3.0. Externally reads as early alpha; internally tracks later milestone.
findings.recommendation: Align public version with milestone or add clear note.

findings.title: No authoritative v0.5 scope in docs/plans
findings.description: docs/plans has v0.2 spec, v0.3 summary, v0.4 candidates. Nothing defines v0.5 exit criteria.
findings.recommendation: Add v05-scope.md with in-scope journeys, minimum providers, explicit deferrals.

findings.title: Some marketed capabilities are partial or environment-specific
findings.description: SSH raises NotImplementedError. HTTP/Shell connectors exist but are not primary. Web app not mentioned.
findings.recommendation: Maintain capability matrix: CLI vs Web vs Planned.

findings.title: GUI journey strong after project selection; first run is power-user skewed
findings.description: Initial landing requires scanning directory path and understanding project layout.
findings.recommendation: Add first-run copy, default scan path, empty-state CTA.

findings.title: Large surface area for Alpha package
findings.description: 3k-line vanilla SPA with custom markdown, i18n 3 languages, CRUD modals. Heavy if MVP is happy-path pipeline.
findings.recommendation: Define thin MVP skin; defer non-critical editor flows.

findings.title: Planning artifacts rich but fragmented
findings.description: Engineers get v0.3 summary; product gets Korean v0.2 spec. README is English CLI-centric.
findings.recommendation: Add docs/README.md index linking plans + current behavior.

overall_impression: Deliberate pipeline product with credible guided flow. Main risks: narrative/entrypoint gaps, mismatched version labels, no v0.5 scope doc.
